title: Louisiana could give Donald Trump another Republican ouster
shortDescription: The president's revenge tour against GOP dissenters goes through Louisiana, where incumbent Sen. Bill Cassidy faces two MAGA rivals.

title: Trump disapproval rises on economy, healthcare
shortDescription: Trump faces record-high disapproval on the economy and healthcare in a new CNN poll, with most Americans saying his policies raised costs.

title: Colorado governor cuts sentence for Tina Peters, who Trump tried to pardon
shortDescription: Gov. Jared Polis commuted the sentence of a woman convicted of crimes tied to tampering with election machines in service of 2020 election conspiracies.

title: Democrats’ redistricting push in Virginia dies at Supreme Court
shortDescription: The U.S. Supreme Court rejected Virginia Democrats' longshot bid to revive a new congressional map. It leaves the national party at a redistricting disadvantage.

title: Trump's name painted on graves at Black cemetery
shortDescription: Police in Florida are investigating vandalism at a predominantly Black cemetery where 17 gravesites were damaged, with Trump's name painted on tombs.

title: Is marijuana legal in GA now? Medical cannabis bill signed into law
shortDescription: A medical cannabis bill that expands access to THC for patients in Georgia was signed into law Tuesday. Here are the new rules.

title: Where Texas's top Republicans stand on the Cornyn-Paxton runoff
shortDescription: Texas Gov. Greg Abbott on Thursday ruled out endorsing in the bitter Cornyn-Paxton U.S. Senate runoff days before early voting begins Monday.

title: Vegan, '6 genders', a 'real hit on Jesus.' Why is Trump going after Talarico?
shortDescription: President Trump reached into a grab bag of insults and attacks on Democrat James Talarico but remained noncommittal in the Texas GOP runoff.

title: Why is Donald Trump not using the dentist office at the White House?
shortDescription: As President Donald Trump heads to Walter Reed for dental work, many Americans are wondering why the White House’s own dental office isn’t being used.

title: What will Trump's new design of the East Potomac Golf Links look like?
shortDescription: The historic East Potomac Golf Links may soon look very different under a Trump-backed redesign aimed at reviving the course and surrounding parkland.

title: What is the 'Thucydides Trap?' Trump blames Biden after Xi's warning
shortDescription: President Trump blamed Joe Biden for making the U.S. "a nation in decline" after Chinese President Xi Jinping warned of the "Thucydides Trap."

title: ATF Trump-era change leads to fewer gun dealer licenses revoked | The Excerpt
shortDescription: The ATF revoked fewer gun dealer licenses in 2025. Is it fairer enforcement, or a weakening of oversight?

title: Pa. Gov. Shapiro sharpens re‑election message around first‑term record
shortDescription: In his bid for a second term, Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro talked about first-term accomplishments as his opponent has highlighted controversies.

title: 'He would like to see it end', Trump says of Xi on Iran war
shortDescription: The president struck a cautiously optimistic tone from Beijing, though it’s unclear if he’ll walk away with any formal guarantees of assistance.
